# PiQrypt MCP Server
Cryptographic audit trail MCP server for AI agents.
Stamps every agent decision with Ed25519 signature,
hash-chains events, detects forks and tampering.

Tools:
  piqrypt_stamp_event    — sign an agent decision
  piqrypt_verify_chain   — verify chain integrity
  piqrypt_export_audit   — export audit trail
  piqrypt_search_events  — search event history

Install (npm):
  npm install @piqrypt/mcp-server
  npx @piqrypt/mcp-server

Requires Python bridge:
  pip install piqrypt

Visualize audit trail (free):
  piqrypt start
  # → http://localhost:8421

Protocol : AISS v2.0
Standard : https://aiss-standard.org
Full stack: https://piqrypt.com
GitHub    : https://github.com/PiQrypt/piqrypt-mcp-server
